name: BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed
notes: This Building Block defines when a command has been executed to change the permissions assigned to a file.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Audit ID (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Call Type (custom) is 268
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of chmod
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: File Permission Changed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Audit ID (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Call Type (custom) is 268
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of chmod
